name: Potato Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Form potato balls with melon baller.
2. Place the balls into boiling water with salt and simmer for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cooked but firm.
3. Drain the potato balls and toss them with butter.
4. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Source: Great Chefs of New Orleans, Tele-record Productions - 1983
: www.greatchefs.com - 747 Magazine Street, New Orleans, LA 70130
: Chef Gunter Preuss, Versailles Restaurant, New Orleans
